2236220.name: Battlemon
2236220.description:
Cute, chaotic, and competitive — Battlemon lets you and your friends face off with quirky creatures in dynamic arena battles.

Step into the world of Battlemon, a fast-paced local multiplayer fighting game where quirky creatures clash in vibrant arenas. Whether you’re going head-to-head with a friend or testing your skills in challenging events, every fight is a chance to discover new strategies and unleash the true power of your favorite Battlemon. Battlemon blends party-game fun with competitive fighting depth, making it perfect for both casual players and those who love finding clever combos. With its charming art style, evolving roster, and easy pick-up-and-play design, it’s a game that keeps surprising you every match.

Key Features

  •  Real-Time Arena Battles
    Engage in vibrant, head-to-head brawls. Battles are handled in real time, so stay sharp and react quickly!

    Huge and Growing Cast of Characters

    Choose from a quirky line-up: Dunse, Abble, Blink, Pelage —and more are frequently added via updates.

    Varied Modes & Events

    Dive into more than just versus battles—test your skills in raids, boss fights, and other engaging event formats.

    Free to Play

    Jump in without paying a penny. Extras like early access characters can be accessed via optional DLCs.

    Couch-PvP Fun

    Perfect for casual local multiplayer sessions—just grab a controller, sit side by side, and duke it out.

    Why It Stands Out

    • Charming Visuals Meet Competitive Depth
      Cute creature fighters bring a whimsical aesthetic, while unique movesets ensure strategic battles.

    • Inclusive, Local Party Play
      No online connection needed—perfect for living room fun with friends or siblings.

    • Constant Evolution
      A continuously expanding roster and event systems mean there's always something new to discover.
2236220.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
